name: LawDepot
cat: Legal Services / Online Legal Document Provider

political.s: No evidence of significant PAC contributions or lobbying activity by LawDepot found in FEC or OpenSecrets databases.

charity.s: No publicly available information on LawDepot's charitable giving or corporate social responsibility programs.

environment.s: No specific environmental practices or sustainability initiatives publicly disclosed by LawDepot.

labor.s: Mixed employee reviews on Glassdoor and Indeed. Positive feedback on work-life balance and culture; concerns raised about micromanagement, employee monitoring, and lack of RRSP matching.

dei.s: No publicly available DEI policy or statement found. Glassdoor reports mention diverse coworkers and positive workplace environment.

animals.s: Not applicable - legal document service company.

guns.s: Not applicable - legal document service company.

privacy.s: LawDepot implements SSL encryption, GDPR/CCPA compliance, and has a published privacy policy. Data retained for 2 years with options for user deletion. Security infrastructure appears solid.

execPay.s: No publicly available information on executive compensation or CEO pay ratios.
